name: Rise of the Eldrazi

draft.notes: Pack is 10 commons, 3 uncommons, a rare, an ad card, and a basic land. If a foil appears it follows the land, displacing a common.

sourceNotes: Large set with 100 commons (one fewer than contemporary large sets). Printed in USA and Belgium. 36 packs per box. Booster has both a basic land and an ad card.
